novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship comparator chain cites LiTchetgenVanDerVaartRobins2011HOIFTreatment by bare bibkey in the §8 why-new block; add a section/theorem/page anchor tying it to the treatment-effect HOIF interval gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The checklist misses KallusMaoUehara2024LDML, a close localized-DML efficient-inference comparator for local treatment-effect functionals; separate it from the proposed CATE q_star order frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The leading existence clause requires kappa in K_q, J_n, and an estimator in A_q^loc for the minimal order, but A_q^loc is defined only for q >= 2 while the conjecture also has a q_star = 1 first-order branch.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Split Conjecture 1 into q_star=1 and q_star>=2 clauses, with A_1 handled by the first-order AIPW class and K_q/J_n only quantified for localized HOIF orders q>=2.
Add location-level anchors for the HOIF and treatment-effect interval comparators, especially Robins et al. 2008 and Li et al. 2011, in the §8 why-new block.

Add a related-work sentence on Kallus, Mao, and Uehara 2024 localized DML, explaining why local QTE/estimating-equation inference does not give the Holder CATE q_star orthogonalization-order frontier.

recommended_next_step: Revise the Conjecture 1 quantifier and add the missing location-level and LDML comparator anchors, then resubmit without changing the kernel.
